title: Bangers and Mash with Indian Twist
description: A classic British dish with an Indian twist, featuring flavorful sausage and creamy mash.

ingredients.name: Fragrant spices
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: Boil the potatoes in the dutch oven until tender.
Chop the onion and sauté in a pan until softened.
Add the sausages to the pan and cook until browned.
Add the fragrant spices, frankfurter mustard, and garam masala to the pan.
Mash the boiled potatoes with butter and milk.
Serve the sausages and sauce over the creamy mash.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
